params.prompt: Transform this room image into a cinematic editorial real-estate still. Preserve exact architecture, perspective, walls, windows, door openings, furniture layout, lens realism, and room scale. Maintain believable residential scale for a 12.5 by 14.5833 ft Nest. Primary light: directional daylight from bay/exterior windows (soft morning or late‑afternoon angle to create long, crisp window pulls). Supplement with a single aged‑brass floor lamp near the sofa and low ambient ceiling/soffit lighting set warmer than window daylight. Keep exposure balanced so exterior view remains readable but interior retains sculpted shadows. A warm, collected interior blending mid‑century forms with artisanal textures and an earthy palette. Deep emerald accents and terracotta art punctuate warm walnut wood, aged‑brass fixtures, and layered natural textiles to create a botanical‑spa, gallery‑like living environment. Prioritize honest daylight from bay/exterior windows and warm practicals to sculpt texture and glaze. Keep these fixed unless the user explicitly wants transformation: exact architecture room geometry furniture layout lens realism vertical line integrity believable scale light entering from visible sources only VISUAL CONSISTENCY REQUIREMENT (reference image provided): The Dine visible through the open-plan dining area must show exactly the same dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round 5ft walnut dining table — warm walnut veneer top, matte black cylindrical pedestal base, seating for 4, sculptural pendant light — aged brass single-disc shade, 24" diameter, smooth matte finish, suspended on dark braided cloth cord as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. The sofa, coffee table, area rug, low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery, dark walnut tapered legs, no visible feet from side angle, large layered rug set — base jute flatweave natural oat, top handwoven low-pile wool rug in terracotta & emerald geometric motif, overall 9x12 ft, tall fiddle leaf fig plant — matte black ceramic planter, ~6ft height, walnut bookshelf (open shelving, warm walnut veneer), bookshelf in this room must exactly match the style, materials, and form shown in reference image — treat it as the definitive source of truth for these pieces. Previous failure modes to correct: major_style_mismatch, object_missing, lighting_unrealistic. The image exhibits a notable style mismatch with an emphasis on bright colors that conflicts with the desired earthy palette. Additionally, the oversized coffee table disrupts the balance in the room, and elements such as a bookshelf appear under-represented or inconsistent with the staging requirements.
